final:
module sram_16bit (  
    input clk,  
    input we,  
    input [3:0] addr,  
    input [15:0] din,  
    output reg [15:0] dout  
);  
    reg [15:0] obf_memory [0:15]; // 16x16-bit obf_memory  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (we) begin  
            obf_memory[addr] <= din; // Write to obf_memory  
        end  
        dout <= obf_memory[addr]; // Read from obf_memory  
    end  
endmodule
